title: facility — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — facility catalogue CRUD by owner/admin/branch-manager; booking CRUD by any member (with per-facility permission for restricted facilities via `facilities.book.branch`); day-pass POS by reception staff + admins; pass management by owner/admin/coach. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read + support tooling. All permissions carry the `facilities.` prefix (or `platform.facilities.` on the platform audience) to align with hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules.

permissions.name: facilities.retire
permissions.description: Transition facility to retired status — terminal, cascades future bookings when combined with --cascade flag.

permissions.name: facilities.manage-pricing
permissions.description: Edit pricing_json. Financial-audit-critical; scoped to admins + owners.

permissions.name: facilities.view-audit-usage
permissions.description: See utilisation reports (hourly occupancy, revenue per facility).

permissions.name: bookings.viewAny
permissions.description: See bookings owned by the caller. Admins additionally see all bookings via the ResourceBookingPolicy scope hook.

permissions.name: bookings.view-all
permissions.description: See EVERY booking in the tenant (staff / support tooling). Distinct from bookings.viewAny (own-only).

permissions.name: bookings.create
permissions.description: Book a facility. Scoped by ResolveScope middleware — a coach with scope 'branch:X' can only book facilities in branch X.

permissions.name: bookings.create.for-other
permissions.description: Book a facility on behalf of ANOTHER user (booked_for_user_id != booked_by_user_id). Parents booking for children, coaches for team members, receptionists for walk-ins.

permissions.name: bookings.cancel
permissions.description: Cancel a booking owned by the caller.

permissions.name: bookings.cancel-any
permissions.description: Cancel any booking, including bypassing the cancellation_notice_hours window.

permissions.name: bookings.mark-no-show
permissions.description: Manually mark a booking as no-show before the automated job runs.

permissions.name: bookings.check-in
permissions.description: Set checked_in_at on a booking. Reception staff + admins.

permissions.name: bookings.complete
permissions.description: Reserved: manual completion is refused by the observer; this permission exists so downstream Wave 4 refund flows can grant it to specific ops staff.

permissions.name: day_passes.issue
permissions.description: POS surface. Reception staff sell day passes.

permissions.name: day_passes.consume
permissions.description: Turnstile / receptionist marks a day pass consumed.

permissions.name: day_passes.refund
permissions.description: Reverse a day-pass sale within the 30-day refund window.

permissions.name: passes.create
permissions.description: Manually issue a pass (Wave 4 will auto-issue on Membership provisioning; manual creates cover ad-hoc cases).

permissions.name: passes.transfer
permissions.description: Change assignable_user_ids on a transferable pass.

permissions.name: passes.revoke
permissions.description: Terminate a pass early (soft-delete + revocation_reason).

permissions.name: platform.facilities.view-audit-usage
permissions.description: Cross-tenant utilisation report for support tooling + capacity planning.

permissions.name: platform.bookings.force-cancel
permissions.description: Support intervention to cancel a booking bypassing every tenant-level guard. Every fire is audit-critical + notifies the tenant admin.
